title: BitmapFrameMessage
description: Bitmap pixel frame for a zone. Inbound: VJ server pushes custom frames to Minecraft. Outbound: Minecraft forwards rendered pattern frames for browser preview.

pixels.description: Base64-encoded little-endian ARGB int array (fast path)

pixel_array.description: JSON array of 32-bit ARGB integers (debug-friendly path)

brightness.description: Per-pixel brightness (0-15). Base64-encoded byte array, one byte per pixel. If absent, all pixels use brightness 15.

width.description: Grid width in pixels. Present on outbound frames from Minecraft.

height.description: Grid height in pixels. Present on outbound frames from Minecraft.
